name: ASUS ROG STRIX B850-A GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX B850-A GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Full-size gaming ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with B850 chipset, DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7 for ROG gaming builds.
